author: F. J. Anscombe (1973)
title: Graphs in Statistical Analysis
why: Bikin ulang Anscombe's quartet: 4 dataset stat sama persis tapi bentuknya beda

author: Francis Galton (1886)
title: Regression Towards Mediocrity in Hereditary Stature
why: Replikate regresi tinggi ortu ke anak, asal-usul 'regression to the mean'

author: Francis Galton (1888)
title: Co-relations and Their Measurement, Chiefly from Anthropometric Data
why: Hitung koefisien korelasi dari nol pakai data antropometri Galton

author: Charles Spearman (1904)
title: The Proof and Measurement of Association Between Two Things
why: Bangun rank correlation (Spearman) buat data berperingkat

author: Brian Hayes (2013)
title: First Links in the Markov Chain
why: Simulasi Markov chain sederhana, rantai keadaan + teks

author: Student (W. S. Gosset) (1908)
title: The Probable Error of a Mean
why: Reimplement uji-t & distribusi t buat sampel kecil

author: Karl Pearson (1901)
title: On Lines and Planes of Closest Fit to Systems of Points in Space
why: Coding PCA versi asli: cari garis/bidang paling pas ke titik data

author: R. A. Fisher (1936)
title: The Use of Multiple Measurements in Taxonomic Problems
why: LDA + dataset iris klasik buat klasifikasi bunga

author: Evelyn Fix & J. L. Hodges (1951)
title: Discriminatory Analysis, Nonparametric Discrimination: Consistency Properties
why: Asal-usul kNN: aturan tetangga terdekat nonparametrik

author: T. M. Cover & P. E. Hart (1967)
title: Nearest Neighbor Pattern Classification
why: Coding 1-NN & buktikan error-nya dibatasi 2x Bayes

author: D. R. Cox (1958)
title: The Regression Analysis of Binary Sequences
why: Regresi logistik buat data biner 0/1

author: J. B. MacQueen (1967)
title: Some Methods for Classification and Analysis of Multivariate Observations
why: Implement k-means clustering dari paper aslinya

author: Joe H. Ward (1963)
title: Hierarchical Grouping to Optimize an Objective Function
why: Hierarchical clustering metode Ward (minimasi varians)

author: S. P. Lloyd (1982)
title: Least Squares Quantization in PCM
why: Algoritma Lloyd (k-means) buat kuantisasi least-squares

author: J. R. Quinlan (1986)
title: Induction of Decision Trees
why: Bangun decision tree ID3 pakai information gain

author: C. C. Holt (1957)
title: Forecasting Seasonals and Trends by Exponentially Weighted Moving Averages
why: Exponential smoothing dengan trend + musiman (Holt)

author: Peter R. Winters (1960)
title: Forecasting Sales by Exponentially Weighted Moving Averages
why: Holt-Winters: smoothing musiman buat forecast penjualan

author: G. Udny Yule (1927)
title: On a Method of Investigating Periodicities in Disturbed Series, with Special Reference to Wolfer's Sunspot Numbers
why: Model autoregresif (AR) pertama dari data sunspot

author: J. A. Hanley & B. J. McNeil (1982)
title: The Meaning and Use of the Area Under a Receiver Operating Characteristic (ROC) Curve
why: Hitung AUC dari kurva ROC + maknanya buat klasifikasi

author: Tom Fawcett (2006)
title: An Introduction to ROC Analysis
why: Gambar kurva ROC & hitung AUC langkah demi langkah

author: Bradley Efron (1979)
title: Bootstrap Methods: Another Look at the Jackknife
why: Bootstrap: resampling buat estimasi standard error

author: B. Efron & G. Gong (1983)
title: A Leisurely Look at the Bootstrap, the Jackknife, and Cross-Validation
why: Bandingin bootstrap, jackknife, dan cross-validation

author: M. Stone (1974)
title: Cross-Validatory Choice and Assessment of Statistical Predictions
why: Cross-validation buat pilih & nilai model prediksi

author: Ron Kohavi (1995)
title: A Study of Cross-Validation and Bootstrap for Accuracy Estimation and Model Selection
why: Uji empiris CV vs bootstrap, kenapa 10-fold menang

author: S. Geman, E. Bienenstock & R. Doursat (1992)
title: Neural Networks and the Bias/Variance Dilemma
why: Trade-off bias-variance, kunci overfitting vs underfitting

author: J. Neyman & E. S. Pearson (1933)
title: On the Problem of the Most Efficient Tests of Statistical Hypotheses
why: Teori uji hipotesis: lemma Neyman-Pearson dari nol
